title: God Hears Us.
content:
God, who's in heaven, will hear from thence;
    If not to th' sound, yet to the sense.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God Hears Us.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
